payload.answer: I’m not sure what “the thing from yesterday” refers to. Please clarify what you want remembered before I can suggest how to handle it.
repair_options: Specify the exact fact, preference, task, or event you want remembered.
If it relates to an existing memory, identify which memory it should be associated with.
If it is a new standalone fact, provide the full wording to store separately.
If you meant to update or replace an earlier memory, describe both the old information and the new information.
